block.header: sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu opo mikoto wo mi kwo tati opo kimi tati omi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,1@命乎親王諸王諸臣百官人等天下公民衆聞食宣,*

block.header: kake maku mo kasikwo ki nara no miya ni ame no sita sira si myesi si yamato ne kwo sumyera mikoto no ini si pa dukwi ni ko no wosu kuni ame no sita no waza wo tutana ku wodina ki ware ni tamaparite tukape mature to opose tamapi saduke tamapi ki to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo itadaki ni uke tamapari kasikwo mi uke tamapari odi susumi mo sira ni sirizoki mo sira ni kasikwo mi masa ku to noritamapu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP,NP,7@天皇詔旨乎頂尔受被賜恐美受被賜懼,*

block.header: sikaru ni ko no ama tu pi tugi taka mi kura no waza pa ame ni masu kamwi kuni ni masu kamwi no api udu napi maturi api tasuke maturu koto ni yori te si ko no kurawi ni pa tapirake ku yasurake ku opo masi masi te ame no sita pa sira si myesu mono ni aru rasi to namo omoposi mye su

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@然此乃天日嗣高御座之業者天坐,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV;@3,IP-ADV,NP,6@物尔在良之止奈母所念行湏,*

block.header: mata sumyera to imasite ame no sita wosame tamapu kimi pa sakasi ki omi no yo ki pito wo e te si ame no sita woba tapirake ku yasurake ku wosamuru mono ni aru rasi to namo kikosi mye su

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,5@物尔在良志止奈母聞看行湏,*

block.header: kare koko wo motite opo mikoto ni imase nori tamapa ku ware pa tutana ku wodina ku aredomo mi kwo tati wo pazimete opo kimi tati omi tati no api ana napi maturi api tasuke matura mu koto ni yorite si ko no opose tamapi saduke tamapu wosu kuni ni ame no sita no maturi goto pa tapirake ku yasurake ku tukape maturu be si to namo omoposi mye su

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,PP-DAT,NP,IP-REL,4@王臣等乃相穴奈比奉相扶奉牟,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,8@仕奉倍之止奈母所念行湏,*

block.header: kare koko wo motite moro moro kiywo ku aka ki kokoro tadasi ku napo ki koto wo motite wosu kuni no maturi goto mawosi tama pi ame no sita no opo mi takara wo utukusibwi wosamu be si to namo omoposi mye su to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV;@4,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,4@天下公民乎恵治倍之止奈母,*

block.header: koto wakite nori tamapaku kotosi no pa dukwi no itu ka no pi pi no miti no siri no kuni no asi kita no kopori no pito pi maturi bye no piro nusi mye sirwo ki kame wo tatematuri ki

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,0@辞別詔今年八月五日肥後国葦北郡人日奉部広主売,*

block.header: mata oyazi tukwi no towo ka amari nanu ka no pi oyazi kuni no masi kwi no kopori no pito yama no ina nusi sirwo ki kame wo tatematuri ki

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@又同月十七日同国益城郡人山稲主,*

block.header: ko pa sunapati narabi ni daizuwi ni kanap yeri
kare ame tuti no tamap yeru opo ki sirusi pa uke tamapari yorokobwi uke tamapari taputwobu be ki mono ni ari
koko wo motite zingo keiun no yo tose wo aratamete pouki no pazime no tosi to su
mata tukape maturu pito domo no naka ni si ka tukape maturu sama ni sitagapi te pito ri puta ri domo kagapuri kurawi age tama pi wosame tama pu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,4@一二人等冠位上賜比治賜布,*

block.header: mata ame no sita piro ku tumi yurusi tamapu
mata ame no sita no mu tu no kurawi ywori simo tu kata no kurawi aru pito domo ni kurawi pito sina tamapu
opo mi kamwi no miya wo pazime te yasiro yasiro no negwi domo ni kurawi pito sina tamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@諸社之祢宜等給位一階,*

block.header: mata popusi no tukasa wo pazime te tera dera no si no kurawi no popu si ama domo ni opo mi mono podokosi tama pu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@諸寺師位僧尼等尔御物布施賜布,*

block.header: mata tosi taka ki pito domo yasinapi tamapu
mata madusi ki pito domo utukusibwi tama pu
mata keugi aru pito domo so no koto yurusi tamapu
mata kotosi ame no sita no tadikara yurusi tamapa ku to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@又今年天下田租免賜久止宣,*
